Project_Type.reference_context: Project : Platform EPCI for Tangguh Gas Production Facilities

Water_Depth.reference_context: The project scope of work consists of engineering, procurement, fabrication and installation of: -  2 (two) Normally Unattended Installation (NUI) offshore platforms (namely VR-A and VR-B) located approximately 20 kilometers from the south shore, 7 kilometers apart and approximately at 60 meters water depth.

Number_of_Slots.reference_context: Major design parameters include: - o Allowance for 16 well slots per platform

Wellhead.reference_context: Commissioning of platform and pipeline facilities, including wellhead flowlines fabrication and installation work to support train 1 and 2 of onshore LNG plant and pipeline dewatering.

Processing.reference_context: Major design parameters include: - o No processing facilities
